ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula (e.g., C5H8F4) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Molecular mass */,
  "energy0" REAL /* Energy level 0 */,
  "energy1" REAL /* Energy level 1 */,
  "energy2" REAL /* Energy level 2 */,
  "rank_e0" INTEGER /* Ranking for energy level 0 */,
  "rank_e1" INTEGER /* Ranking for energy level 1 */,
  "rank_e2" INTEGER /* Ranking for energy level 2 */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches */,
  "mass_in_mgf" REAL /* Mass in MGF format */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the molecule */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* InChI for the molecule */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* IUPAC name of the molecule */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecules_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dtxcids" (
  "dtxcid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DTXCID */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the DTXCID belongs to */,
  "dtxcid" TEXT /* DTXCID value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dtxcid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or link to the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecule_sources" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "dtxcid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DTXCID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id", "source_id", "dtxcid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the molecule */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user uploading the molecule */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file (e.g., SDF, MOL, CSV) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., molecular modeling) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method or tool used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., molecular structure) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score or probability of the result */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details or metadata about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., random forest) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the trained model file on the server */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the prediction belongs to */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the prediction was made on */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model (e.g., molecular property) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score or probability of the prediction */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details or metadata about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
